---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for ATOMIC Framework
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe the scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
